post.headline: Meet NeonPanda ⚡
post.subline: The AI fitness coach that actually gets you — not just your goals, but your whole story.
post.caption: We built something different. NeonPanda gives you an AI fitness coach with a real personality, one that learns how you train, adapts to your life, and shows up every single day ready to push you further. This is what fitness coaching looks like when it finally feels personal. Check us out at https://neonpanda.ai/

story.headline: Your AI Fitness Coach, Powered by Personality ⚡
story.subline: Seriously smart, refreshingly fun — meet the coach that was built just for you.

linkedin.headline: Introducing NeonPanda: AI Fitness Coaching That Actually Gets You ⚡
linkedin.subline: We built an agentic AI fitness coach that doesn't just respond to your questions — it reasons over your goals, remembers your context, and builds training that adapts to your real life.
linkedin.caption: Generic fitness apps give everyone the same plan. NeonPanda does something fundamentally different. Our AI fitness coach agent builds a custom coaching personality around you, holds the full context of your training history, and continuously adapts your program as your life and performance evolve. It's not a chatbot with a workout library — it's an agent that reasons, plans, and acts like a coach who's been with you since day one. Whether you're a fitness enthusiast who wants coaching that fits your life, or a fitness professional looking to extend your impact at scale, NeonPanda is built for you. Come see what intelligent, approachable fitness coaching looks like at https://neonpanda.ai/
